@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async∧await∧same_order(missing_id>db.findUser>not_found>audit.log>cache.set)
P: missing_id_before_db→return∧db_err→next(err)∧async_await
V: missing_id_before_db∧not_found_before_audit∧audit.log∧cache.set
R: !change_order∧!extra
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async and await and same validation order(missing_id>db.findUser>not_found>audit.log>cache.set).
Plan: missing id check before database call then return and db_err then next(err) and async/await.
Verify: missing id check before database call and not found check before audit and audit.log and cache.set.
Risk: high-risk change_order and high-risk extra.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.
